properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a church in the valley by the wildwood No lovelier place in the dale No spot is so dear to my childhood As the little brown church in the vale

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: (Oh, come, come, come, come) Come to the church by the wildwood Oh, come to the church in the dale No spot is so dear to my childhood As the little brown church in the dale

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How sweet on a clear Sabbath morning To listen to the clear ringing bells Its tones so sweetly are calling Oh come to the church in the vale

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There, close by the church in the valley Lies one that I loved so well She sleeps, sweetly sleeps, 'neath the willow Disturb not her rest in the vale

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There, close by the side of that loved one 'Neath the tree where the wild flowers bloom When farewell hymns shall be chanted I shall rest by her side in the tomb
